headline: J.P. Morgan cuts second-half 2026 Brent oil price forecast
summary: Investing.com -- J.P. Morgan reduced its price outlook for Brent crude oil in the second half of 2026 on Wednesday, citing weaker commercial inventory withdrawals and softer oil demand than previously anticipated.
